---
layout: default
title: Resume / CV
---

<div class="page-card lock-card" id="resume-locked">
  <div class="lock-shield">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <rect x="3" y="11" width="18" height="11" rx="2"></rect>
      <path d="M7 11V7a5 5 0 0 1 10 0v4"></path>
      <circle cx="12" cy="16" r="1.4"></circle>
    </svg>
  </div>
  <span class="section-eyebrow" style="display:block;">Protected Page</span>
  <h1 style="border:none;padding-bottom:0;">Resume / CV is private</h1>
  <p class="lock-intro">
    This page is password-protected. If you are a recruiter, school, or professional
    contact, please enter the access password to view Harish Kumar&rsquo;s full resume and CV.
  </p>
  <form id="unlock-form" class="lock-form" autocomplete="off">
    <label for="unlock-pw">Access password</label>
    <div class="lock-input-row">
      <input type="password" id="unlock-pw" placeholder="Enter password"
             autocomplete="off" autocapitalize="off" spellcheck="false">
      <button type="submit" id="unlock-btn" class="btn-primary">Unlock</button>
    </div>
    <div id="unlock-msg" class="lock-msg" role="status" aria-live="polite"></div>
  </form>
  <p class="lock-help">
    Don&rsquo;t have the password?
    <a href="{{ '/contact.html' | relative_url }}">Request access through the contact form</a>
    or connect on
    <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/harishjhaldiyal" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>.
  </p>
</div>

<div class="page-card resume-reveal" id="resume-content" style="display:none;"></div>

{% raw %}
<script id="resume-cipher" type="application/json">{"v":1,"iter":250000,"salt":"rHvz1J79ovYoDHWwLBRU2A==","html":{"iv":"traxzCbEiwB+0rpQ","ct":""},"pdf":{"iv":"o75p4OHL7b869JaZ","ct":""}}</script>
<script>
(function () {
  var box = document.getElementById('resume-cipher');
  var cipher = JSON.parse(box.textContent);
  var lockEl = document.getElementById('resume-locked');
  var contentEl = document.getElementById('resume-content');
  var form = document.getElementById('unlock-form');
  var input = document.getElementById('unlock-pw');
  var btn = document.getElementById('unlock-btn');
  var msg = document.getElementById('unlock-msg');

  function b64ToBytes(b64) {
    var bin = atob(b64);
    var out = new Uint8Array(bin.length);
    for (var i = 0; i < bin.length; i++) out[i] = bin.charCodeAt(i);
    return out;
  }
  function fail(text) {
    msg.className = 'lock-msg lock-err';
    msg.textContent = text;
  }
  if (!window.crypto || !crypto.subtle) {
    fail('This browser cannot open the protected page. Please use an up-to-date browser over HTTPS.');
    if (btn) btn.disabled = true;
    return;
  }

  async function deriveKey(password) {
    var enc = new TextEncoder();
    var baseKey = await crypto.subtle.importKey(
      'raw', enc.encode(password), 'PBKDF2', false, ['deriveKey']);
    return crypto.subtle.deriveKey(
      { name: 'PBKDF2', salt: b64ToBytes(cipher.salt), iterations: cipher.iter, hash: 'SHA-256' },
      baseKey,
      { name: 'AES-GCM', length: 256 },
      false, ['decrypt']);
  }
  function decryptPart(key, part) {
    return crypto.subtle.decrypt(
      { name: 'AES-GCM', iv: b64ToBytes(part.iv) }, key, b64ToBytes(part.ct));
  }

  function reveal(html, pdfBuffer) {
    var bar =
      '<div class="resume-private-bar">' +
        '<span class="rpb-tag">Private page &middot; unlocked</span>' +
        '<a href="#" class="rpb-lock" onclick="location.reload();return false;">Lock again</a>' +
      '</div>';
    contentEl.innerHTML = bar + html;
    var url = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([pdfBuffer], { type: 'application/pdf' }));
    var view = document.getElementById('resume-pdf-view');
    var dl = document.getElementById('resume-pdf-download');
    if (view) view.href = url;
    if (dl) dl.href = url;
    lockEl.style.display = 'none';
    contentEl.style.display = 'block';
    contentEl.scrollIntoView({ block: 'start', behavior: 'auto' });
  }

  form.addEventListener('submit', function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    var pw = input.value;
    if (!pw) { input.focus(); return; }
    var label = btn.textContent;
    btn.disabled = true;
    btn.textContent = 'Unlocking...';
    msg.className = 'lock-msg';
    msg.textContent = '';
    deriveKey(pw).then(function (key) {
      return Promise.all([decryptPart(key, cipher.html), decryptPart(key, cipher.pdf)]);
    }).then(function (parts) {
      reveal(new TextDecoder().decode(parts[0]), parts[1]);
    }).catch(function () {
      fail('Incorrect password. Please check it and try again.');
      btn.disabled = false;
      btn.textContent = label;
      input.value = '';
      input.focus();
    });
  });
})();
</script>
{% endraw %}
